milestone_title: RED capture + node-kind audit + helper audit

red_capture.verdict: Carry-forward `ruby_command_injection_positive` is RED at HEAD as expected. M2 must transition it to GREEN.

fixture_audit.shape: backtick form: `#{cmd}` with cmd = params[:cmd] on prior line
fixture_audit.literal_assertion: Line 7 contains `\`#{cmd}\`` (backtick form, NOT %x{}); confirmed by file read
fixture_audit.fp_fixture_assertion: Mentions WORD 'backtick cmd' inside string literal at line 8; no real subshell node — descendants walk yields zero subshell

node_audit_static.implication: Both backtick `cmd` and %x{cmd}/%x[cmd]/%x(cmd) collapse onto subshell. Single dispatch arm covers all 6 lexical forms.

helper_audit.evidence: Strict path at L4022-L4036 requires either child_by_field_name("arguments") OR a child whose kind contains 'argument' or equals 'call_suffix'. Subshell has NEITHER — children are interpolation / string_content / escape_sequence. The `?` operator at L4036 short-circuits to None.
helper_audit.consequence: Without helper extension, dispatch arm extracts var=None → emits zero sinks → ruby_command_injection_positive STAYS RED. Premortem T1 / R-DISPATCH-1 confirmed.
helper_audit.remediation: M2 MUST add a Ruby-specific subshell BFS arm at the same site as PHP echo BFS (L3948-L3983) BEFORE the generic args-list path.

taint_sink_struct_audit.consequence: Premortem T2 / R-DISPATCH-2 confirmed: M2 dispatch arm MUST construct TaintSink with all 5 fields. Plan §5 sketch (4 fields) would fail E0063.
